sentences.arabic: الرِّيَاضَةُ تُسَاعِدُ فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى وَزْنٍ مِثَالِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Vježbanje pomaže u održavanju idealne težine.
sentences.translationEn: Exercise helps in maintaining an ideal weight.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ نِصْفَ سَاعَةٍ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam u parku pola sata svakog jutra.
sentences.translationEn: I walk in the park for half an hour every morning.

sentences.translation: Osjećam se aktivno i energično nakon šetnje.
sentences.translationEn: I feel active and energetic after walking.
